items.headline: Apollo (APO) Opens Private Markets To Individual Investors With New Model Portfolios
items.summary: Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) has partnered with Morningstar, Franklin Templeton, and J.P. Morgan Asset Management to launch public/private model portfolios. The new portfolios are designed to give individual investors access to private markets such as private credit and real estate. The partnership focuses on research-driven models that blend public securities with private market exposure for use by financial advisors and their clients. Apollo Global Management is known for its focus...

items.headline: Morningstar Teams Up With Apollo, Franklin Templeton and J.P. Morgan on Public/Private Model Portfolios
items.summary: The six new portfolios, which are expected to launch later this year, will invest from 12% to 20% of assets in private credit and real estate.
